With 43 species on life list, interested in learning about similar species already seen; asked about Mourning Doves & Red-shouldered Hawks and similar species
Similar to Mourning Dove: White-winged Dove, Eurasian Collared-Dove, Inca Dove; found in open woods/savannas/backyards; feed on seeds/fruits/insects
Similar to Red-shouldered Hawk: Broad-winged Hawk, Cooper's Hawk, Sharp-shinned Hawk; inhabit deciduous/mixed forests; feed on small mammals, reptiles, amphibians
